ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_cover_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land cover type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the land cover type (e.g., Asphalt, Meadows) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land cover type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code to visually represent the land cover type on maps */,
  "is_permanent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the land cover type is permanent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the land cover type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land cover type being classified */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification was performed */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the classification data (e.g., satellite imagery) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the classification result */,
  "area_covered" REAL /* The total area covered by the land cover type in the classification result */,
  "spatial_resolution" TEXT /* The spatial resolution of the source data */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The name of the machine learning algorithm used for classification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A confidence score for the classification result */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the classification result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES land_cover_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accuracy_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accuracy metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification result */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land cover type being measured */,
  "accuracy_value" REAL /* Accuracy value for the land cover type in the classification result */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of accuracy metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the accuracy value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the accuracy metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES land_cover_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accuracy_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES classification_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, environmental specialist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
